title: Roomba vs Roborock
shortAnswer: Roborock offers higher suction power and advanced features, while Roomba focuses on smart navigation and obstacle avoidance. Both brands excel in different areas.

keyDifferences.label: Mopping System
keyDifferences.entityBValue: Spinning mopheads with hot water cleaning

keyDifferences.label: Dock Features
keyDifferences.entityBValue: Mop cleaning, drying, and hot water washing

prosA: Advanced object recognition with j9+ series
consA: Limited mopping capabilities compared to competitors
prosB: Advanced mopping with hot water cleaning and drying
Multiple model variants for different needs
Innovative features like extending mopheads and anti-tangle brushes
consB: Complex model lineup can be confusing
Some models lack camera-based obstacle avoidance
verdict: Roborock leads in raw performance with superior suction power and advanced mopping features. Roomba maintains its edge in smart navigation and brand reliability, making it better for users prioritizing proven technology over cutting-edge features.
